assignees: ''

<!-- Clear description of the task -->

**What are the goals for this task:**

- [ ] Goal 1
- [ ] Goal 2
- [ ] Goal 3

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

**How will we know when this task is complete:**

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Code reviewed

---

## 📋 Subtasks / Checklist

**Break down the work into smaller steps:**

- [ ] Subtask 1
  - [ ] Detail 1a
  - [ ] Detail 1b
- [ ] Subtask 2
- [ ] Subtask 3

## 📊 Task Metadata

- **Priority:** [ ] P0 (Critical) [ ] P1 (High) [ ] P2 (Medium) [ ] P3 (Low)
- **Estimated Effort:** [ ] S (Small) [ ] M (Medium) [ ] L (Large) [ ] XL (Extra Large)
- **Milestone:** v2.0.0-beta
- **Component:**
  - [ ] Web UI
  - [ ] Discord Bot
  - [ ] API/Backend
  - [ ] Database
  - [ ] AI Agent
  - [ ] Tests/CI
  - [ ] Documentation

- **Assigned to:** @user
- **Reviewer(s):** @reviewer
- **Dependencies:**
  - Blocked by: #
  - Blocks: #

## 📝 Notes

**Additional notes or context:**

---

## 📈 Progress Tracking

**Use this to update progress:**

- [ ] 0% - Not started
- [ ] 25% - Started
- [ ] 50% - In progress
- [ ] 75% - Nearly complete
- [ ] 100% - Done (close issue)

**Last Updated:** [Date]
**Status:** In Progress

---

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] Task is clearly defined
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are specific
- [ ] Subtasks are broken down
- [ ] Assigned to responsible person
- [ ] Priority is set

---

Links to related tasks, issues, or discussions:
- Part of: [Epic/Milestone]
- Related tasks: #, #
- Discussion: [link]
